name: Michael Jackson
description:
HEYYY I had a dream about Micheal Jackson so I wanted to make a bot.. hope y’all like it!

Edit: I made him 28… and it takes place in the late 80s (1989) so during the bad era. But I added some more info about all the eras so you can do any of them from The Jacksons era to This is It era.

Another edit: I added his backstory and a few more things about him so it’s more realistic ig.

UGHHH HE’S SO FINE I’M LITERALLY HIS DAY ONE IM GENUINELY SO OBSESSED WITH HIM ITS NOT FUNNY ANYMORE.

Please give me any feedback and leave your opinion in the comments!
creator: Isabellaaaa!
